items.title: Segway has dropped its 40-mile-ready Max G30P electric scooter back to its $500 low
items.summary:
As part of Segway’s ongoing Summer Sale, the brand has dropped its Max G30P Electric Scooter to $499.99 shipped, with the only match at Amazon being in a used condition. While it may have a $1,000 full price tagged on, you can more often find it down between $700 and $600 on average, with sales offering bigger discounts to $550, and more recently $500, which we saw for the first time in April. Now, this $200 markdown ($500 off the MSRP) is back around the bend for another go, giving you until the end of the month to grab one for your own commutes at the all-time lowest price we have tracked. You can also view the rest of the Summer Sale lineup of deals while they last in our original coverage here.

This model typically carries a $1,000 regular price, and today’s deal knocks a hefty $300 off that rate to mark one of the lowest prices we have tracked for it to date. items.title: Add this magnetic 42-in-1 screwdriver set with T-handle and ratcheting design to your toolkit for $15 (Reg. $25)
items.summary:
ORIA 42-in-1 T-Handle Magnetic Screwdriver Set

Buy for $15 (Reg. $25)

What we love

Sometimes using a powered screwdriver can rapidly strip or overtighten screws, and that’s when using a hand tool makes a lot more sense. Not only does this kit give you a nice. grip with the T-style handle, but it also has a ratcheting design that makes it easy to just keep tightening over and over without resetting your grip after each turn.

TESSAN Universal USB-C Travel Adapter

Buy for $18 (Reg. $22)

What we love

This affordable universal travel adapter from TESSAN “works in over 150 countries including the USA, UK, EU, Australia, and Asia.” Aside from the sheer affordability, I dig the compact design and fact that it has 25W USB-C charging in tow. That’s enough to handle a lot of power efficient devices ranging from iPhone to iPad, MacBook Neo, and more.
